ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Rothstein, via Zoom, for Cynthia Skinner, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports of having submitted a report for e-filing but that it had been rejected due to an incorrect caption. Counsel offers an oral report as to the status of the Estate and requests a continuance to the middle of June of 2023. The court advises that it is not inclined to allow a continuance of that length.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Feb-15-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-21-2021 is admitted to probate. Cynthia A. Skinner is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-12-2022 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Dec-05-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Continued To Nov-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
